name: @vektormemory/prov
description: Cryptographic proof-of-authorship tooling for any codebase. Merkle-tree manifests, git commit binding, dual RFC 3161 + OpenTimestamps anchoring.

scripts.prepack: node provenance.mjs stamp add && node provenance.mjs notice create && node provenance.mjs manifest create && node provenance.mjs timestamp create
